title: Foundation Master Bundle
description: Composed foundation governance bundle (SP13 T-2 + T-3; SP15 T-4 absorbed pillars 7 + 8; SP17a T-6 part-2 retired top-level denorm slots .types + .r32_type_aliases — types is canonical at .frontmatter.types; r32_type_aliases relocated to .frontmatter.r32_type_aliases). Built deterministically from the 8 authoring pillars (frontmatter-rules + tagging-rules + naming-rules + mandatory-files-rules + doc-dependencies + file-type-contracts/*.json + vault-writers-rules + plans-rules) plus _index.json by tools/build-foundation-master.sh and committed at governance/foundation-master.json. Shipped as immutable artifact to adopter ~/.claude/governance/foundation-master.json per feedback_ship_bundle_dont_build_on_consumer. SP13 T-3 extended the schema to declare 3 absorbed gate-config slots (r32_type_aliases + r32_exempt_paths + r47_tag_cap) so hooks/pre-write-guard.sh + hooks/post-write-verify.sh drop direct gate-config reads while gate-config physical retirement waits for T-6. SP15 T-4 added pillar 7 (vault_writers; carries daily_processing_root + writer_manifest_path + historical_data_warning_default per §A47 + §A60 + §A61 + L-104) + pillar 8 (plans; cooldown_days: 3 foundation default per §A59 + §A65). This validator is intentionally light: structural shape only; inner pillar content is governed by each pillar's own contracts. write_shape enum on file-type contracts (per §A62 + L-108) is asserted by the SP15 T-4 unit test, not at schema layer (keeps file_type_contracts entry shape permissive per existing discipline).

bundle_version.description: sha256 of the canonical-serialized bundle content (excluding _meta block itself). Same source files -> same hash. Hook bundle-read path uses this for cache-invalidation.

source_file_mtimes.description: Map of source-file path -> ISO8601 UTC mtime. Hook bundle-read path may use this for staleness detection.

deterministic_serialization.description: Note declaring the serialization discipline used (e.g., 'jq -S sorted-keys canonical JSON')

frontmatter.description: Full governance/frontmatter-rules.json content (SP13 T-4 absorbed types + tiers + path_routing + archetype enum/fields). SP17a T-6 part-2 (2026-05-21): build-time composition injects r32_type_aliases as a sub-field (.frontmatter.r32_type_aliases) — source-of-truth stays in schemas/gate-config.json until a later sub-plan moves it into the frontmatter-rules.json pillar source.

r32_type_aliases.description: SP17a T-6 part-2 (2026-05-21): alias-type → canonical-type map composed at build time from schemas/gate-config.json#r32.type_aliases. Hooks read .frontmatter.r32_type_aliases exclusively. Replaces top-level .r32_type_aliases (retired).

tagging.description: Full governance/tagging-rules.json content (SP13 T-4 canonical taxonomy)

doc_dependencies.description: Full governance/doc-dependencies.json content (SP13 T-4 first-class authoring pillar per feedback_doc_deps_first_class)

file_type_contracts.description: Map of file-type-name -> contract object. Each key matches a file in governance/file-type-contracts/<name>.json (k8s paramKind pattern; matcher in mandatory-files-rules.json mandates.<file_type>). SP03 Session 20 shipped _index.md as first instance. SP15 T-4 added write_shape enum [create-only|append-template|amend-via-prompt|replace] per §A62 + L-108; enum value asserted by SP15 T-4 unit test, not at schema layer (file_type_contracts entry shape stays permissive per existing discipline).

vault_writers.description: Full governance/vault-writers-rules.json content (SP14 Batch A pillar 7; SP15 T-4 bundle absorb). Carries pillar 7 fields daily_processing_root + writer_manifest_path + historical_data_warning_default per §A47 + §A60 + §A61 + L-104.

plans.description: Full governance/plans-rules.json content (SP14 Batch A pillar 8; SP15 T-4 bundle absorb). Ships cooldown_days: 3 foundation default per §A59 + §A65. Pillar 8 covers plan-tree governance: root file mandates, plan-folder quartet, slug/subplan rules, backlog row contract, lifecycle status transitions, 5-validation-class fan-out.

_index.description: Full governance/_index.json content (pillar registry + cross-cutting meta-rules + dissolved_schemas registry)

r47_exempt_paths_composed.description: Deterministic union of R-47 exempt-paths from all contributing pillars (SP13 T-4: tagging-rules.json#r47_exempt_paths is the canonical declaration; gate-config.json contributes interim entries until T-6 retirement). Deduped + sorted for deterministic ordering.

r32_type_aliases.description: SP13 T-3: alias-type → canonical-type map (e.g. {"skill-spec": "reference"}). Lifted verbatim from gate-config.json#r32.type_aliases per freeze-with-marker discipline; hooks read this top-level slot. Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting (frontmatter-rules.json#types.<canonical>.aliases is the leading candidate per the type-registry inversion +1 option).

r32_exempt_paths.description: SP13 T-3: R-32 type-check exempt globs. Lifted verbatim from gate-config.json#r32.exempt_paths per freeze-with-marker discipline; distinct from r47_exempt_paths_composed (R-32 is the type-allowlist gate; R-47 is the tag-conformance gate). Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard.

r32_type_aliases.description: RETIRED at top level by SP17a T-6 part-2 (2026-05-21). r32_type_aliases now lives at .frontmatter.r32_type_aliases (pillar-nested form). Schema declaration kept as deprecated-stub for back-compat with bundles built before T-6 part-2; new builds do NOT emit this top-level slot. Hooks read .frontmatter.r32_type_aliases exclusively. Slot removal from schema deferred to SP18 absorb after archetype cleanup.

r47_tag_cap.description: SP13 T-3: per-file tag count cap. Lifted from gate-config.json#r47.tag_cap; default 25. Interim location until SP13 T-6 pillar-shard relocates to tagging-rules.json#taxonomy.
